name: istart-note-ai
description: IStart-Note-AI: an Obsidian plugin that turns notes into a structured personal knowledge system, powered by DeepSeek and other OpenAI-compatible LLMs.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.test: echo "no tests yet — see CONTRIBUTING.md for the planned vitest setup" && exit 0
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.version: node scripts/version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Yan
